intent: A Funk/Phonk YouTube channel leaderboard website based on subscriber count, growing into total views and trending metrics.
agency: Agent decides defaults. Strong foundation optimized for long-term growth.

designTokens.theme: Dark, atmospheric, 'Phonk' aesthetic (dark grays/blacks with deep neon purple/red accents)
designTokens.avoid: Emojis, generic SaaS templates, hardcoded colors

features: Automatic subscriber count fetching via YouTube API
